objective: Harden the opencodex GitHub Actions CI and complete a verified production deployment from /Users/jun/Developer/new/700_projects/opencodex using a HOTL cxc-loop. Concrete outcome: audit and harden ci.yml, service-lifecycle.yml, deploy-docs.yml, and release.yml for deterministic least-privilege SHA-correct gates; diagnose cancelled dev CI at 1cc2dd87; publish the next valid stable patch release through trusted npm/GitHub Release; verify npm dist-tag, tag/release SHA, GitHub Pages, and fast-forward main/dev/preview alignment. Scope in: .github/workflows/**, scripts/release.ts and focused tests, package/version metadata, devlog/_plan/260710_ci_release_hardening/**, GitHub Actions and public deployment verification. Out of scope: provider/runtime features, force-pushes, rewriting tags, bypassing CI, weakening release gates, static npm tokens, unrelated refactors. Work phases: WP1 CI diagnosis/hardening; WP2 release/deploy hardening and dry-run; WP3 actual stable deployment and smoke/alignment. Done only with fresh local and remote evidence, successful required workflows, npm latest new version, matching GitHub tag/release, responding Pages, aligned branches, clean tree. NOOP requires current proof; BLOCKED requires repeated external config failure; UNSAFE/NEEDS_HUMAN only for destructive or credential ambiguity; BUDGET_EXHAUSTED after 3 hours with no false completion. First phase: WP1 at P after registration.

criteria.scenario: Cancelled dev CI has an evidence-backed root cause
criteria.expectedEvidence: job/step conclusions and logs identify cancellation or timeout mechanism
criteria.capturedEvidence: run 29063166533 (dev, 1cc2dd87): windows-latest test job hit the 8-minute job timeout, not concurrency cancellation; the kiro-retry TimeoutError test mock subscribed to an already-aborted 1ms AbortSignal.timeout (EventTarget does not replay abort) so it never settled. Fixed with a pre-aborted-signal branch in tests/kiro-retry.test.ts (commit f19d622c); windows-latest success in run 29075154993.

criteria.scenario: CI hardening preserves cross-platform test/package gates without silent success
criteria.expectedEvidence: workflow diff audit plus local workflow checks and successful Ubuntu/macOS/Windows jobs
criteria.capturedEvidence: ci.yml actions pinned to tag target SHAs, 8m timeout kept; actionlint clean; tests/ci-workflows.test.ts pins invariants; isolated worktree at f19d622c full suite 1927 pass 0 fail; remote CI success dev 29075154993 + preview 29075156175 with all 6 matrix jobs green.

criteria.scenario: Service lifecycle checks fail loudly and use bounded readiness
criteria.expectedEvidence: activation evidence for health/service failure branches and successful required remote run
criteria.capturedEvidence: service-lifecycle.yml: contents:read, ref concurrency, 10m timeouts, bounded polls asserting manager state AND /healthz on all 3 OS, swallowed curl||echo removed, crash-restart requires new positive MainPID + health, !cancelled() cleanup asserts artifact/label/task/health gone; remote success dev 29075154975 + preview 29075156176 (3/3 jobs each).

criteria.scenario: Release workflow accepts only successful CI for the exact release SHA and channel
criteria.expectedEvidence: audit/tests cover wrong SHA, branch, tag, and missing required run
criteria.capturedEvidence: release.yml requires a successful ci.yml run for the exact GITHUB_SHA plus branch/channel/dist-tag guards; service-gate regex fixed to cover post-restructure paths (src/cli/index.ts, src/lib/bun-runtime.ts) in sync with service-lifecycle triggers; invariant tests pin guards; opus-4-6 independent audit PASS; live negative dispatch on dev (run 29076106927) hard-failed at the version gate; dry-run gates passed on main@893f202b.

criteria.scenario: Publish path remains trusted-publishing OIDC with least privilege and no static npm token
criteria.capturedEvidence: permissions: contents:write + actions:read + id-token:write only; no secrets.NPM_TOKEN / NODE_AUTH_TOKEN (test-pinned); tokenless OIDC trusted publishing; workflow_dispatch inputs env-indirected in all run blocks; actions SHA-pinned; dry-run run 29076039040 published nothing and packed successfully.

criteria.scenario: Release dry-run builds and packs the intended version from the intended commit
criteria.expectedEvidence: successful GitHub Release workflow dry-run URL and artifact/package output
criteria.capturedEvidence: scripts/release.ts 2.7.5 (dry-run) bumped+pushed 893f202b to main, waited for CI success 29075907472, dispatched Release run 29076039040 = SUCCESS: version match 2.7.5, CI-for-SHA gate, preflight (no existing tag/release/npm), prepublishOnly build + npm pack --dry-run.

criteria.expectedEvidence: successful release workflow URL; npm exact version and latest dist-tag

criteria.scenario: GitHub tag and release match the deployed commit with rollback reference
criteria.expectedEvidence: tag SHA, release URL, previous tag and installable prior version

criteria.scenario: GitHub Pages deployment succeeds and public site responds
criteria.expectedEvidence: successful Pages run plus HTTP 200 public URL/content smoke

criteria.scenario: main dev preview align by fast-forward and repository is clean
criteria.expectedEvidence: remote branch SHAs equal final intended SHA, no force push, clean git status
